svg.title: Network topology: only the Gateway BFF has public ingress
svg.desc: Three stacked zones. The public internet zone contains only the browser. The edge/DMZ zone contains only the Gateway BFF, the sole component with public ingress. The private network zone contains Module 1 BFF and future module BFFs, none of which have public ingress or public DNS. The Gateway BFF and Module 1 BFF each have egress-only connections out to external systems: Entra ID and a third-party API respectively.
